name: Cherry Jubilee Salad
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup London Cuvee Superieur Red wine
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the pineapple and reserve the juice.
2. Heat the reserved juice with an additional 1-1/2 cups of pineapple juice until boiling.
3. Dissolve two packages of Cherry Jello in the hot mixture.
4. Add the London Cuvee Superieur Red wine and nutmeg, stirring to combine.
5. Allow the mixture to cool slightly before chilling it.
6. Fold in the pineapple chunks, drained cherries, and chopped pecans into the chilled mixture.
7. Pour the mixture into a 1-1/2 quart mold and chill until firm.
8. Unmold the salad and serve over salad greens.
